# RoomFlip.io

> AI-powered interior design tool. Upload a room photo, pick a style, get a photorealistic redesign in 30 seconds.

## What is RoomFlip?

RoomFlip.io is a free online tool that uses artificial intelligence to redesign rooms. Users upload a photo of any room — bedroom, living room, kitchen, bathroom, or office — select one of 17 design styles, and receive a photorealistic AI-generated redesign in approximately 30 seconds.

## Key Facts

- URL: https://roomflip.io
- Price: Free (5 redesigns per day, no account required)
- Styles: 17 (Modern, Minimalist, Scandinavian, Japanese, Luxury, Bohemian, Mid-Century Modern, Coastal, Farmhouse, Contemporary, Rustic, Tropical, Art Deco, Futuristic, Gothic, Mediterranean, Vintage)
- Technology: Google AI (generative image models)
- Generation time: ~30 seconds
- Input: Any room photo (JPEG, PNG)
- Output: Photorealistic redesigned room image (downloadable HD)
- No signup required
- Works on desktop and mobile browsers

## How It Works

1. Upload a photo of your room
2. Choose from 17 design styles
3. AI analyzes room structure (walls, floors, windows, doors)
4. AI generates a photorealistic redesign preserving room layout
5. Download the HD result for free

## Use Cases

- Home renovation planning and visualization
- Interior design inspiration
- Real estate staging visualization
- Comparing multiple design styles for the same room
- Furniture placement ideas
- Before/after visualization

## Features

- 17 curated interior design styles
- Before/after comparison slider
- Furniture photo upload (AI incorporates specific furniture into redesign)
- Shop This Look (furniture recommendations per style)
- No watermarks on downloads
- Mobile-friendly responsive design

## Pages

- Homepage: https://roomflip.io
- About / How It Works: https://roomflip.io/about
- Blog: https://roomflip.io/blog
- Privacy Policy: https://roomflip.io/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://roomflip.io/terms
- Style pages: https://roomflip.io/styles/[style-name]
